query: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.consultorId, a.turmaId, a.programId, c.name as mentorName FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN consultors c ON a.consultorId = c.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%Jos%Silva%' OR a.name LIKE '%jose%silva%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.consultorId, a.turmaId, a.programId, c.name as mentorName FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN consultors c ON a.consultorId = c.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%Jos%Silva%' OR a.name LIKE '%jose%silva%'
